DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AT&T CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF GREGGORY D. JOHNSON AKA JAMAL A. JOHNSON-CARRINGTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AT & T IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSE MORENO, AREA RETAIL MANAGER. PARTIES RECESSED DURING THE HEARING TO NEGOTIATE A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. AFTER RECALLING THE CASE THE PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, GREGGORY D. AKA JAMAL A. JOHNSON-CARRINGTON
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
